task: Record irrelevant edu tier3 candidates so backlog can drain

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires evidence mapped to the request; unresolved runtime checks must be reported as residual risk.
Code changes require real verification evidence and completion evidence before push or closeout.

problem: The edu tier3 runners counted is_relevant=false candidates as skipped without saving a refined_outputs row, so the same low-value candidates stayed pending and were retried in later backlog runs.
fix: For is_relevant=false outputs, refiner now normalizes a safe evidence_posture and non-empty final_title, and both edu tier3 runners save the candidate with a model suffix of :irrelevant before incrementing skipped. If the model output cannot be parsed or validated and no high-score fallback is available, the runners save an :error-skip marker to prevent endless retries.

verification.name: pre-push guard before evidence
verification.result: blocked as expected before this evidence file existed: code/governance changes require completion evidence JSON

verification.name: macmini free-tier skip-recording sample
verification.result: pass: runner completed 정제 0 / 스킵 20 / 실패 0 after deployment; all 20 sampled filtered_signal ids had refined_outputs rows with tier3_model gemini-2.5-flash:irrelevant

verification.name: macmini free-tier null-title smoke before error-skip fix
verification.result: residual risk found: runner saved 4 irrelevant candidates but had 1 JSONDecodeError failure; follow-up patch adds :error-skip persistence for no-fallback parse/validation errors

deployment.result: Mac Mini deploy script completed; origin diff verification returned 0 for all target files and backend restarted on port 8000.

remaining_verification: After deploying the error-skip patch, run another Mac Mini --free-tier smoke sample and confirm parse/validation errors are persisted as skipped instead of counted as failed.
